build_system: pnpm workspaces + turbo for orchestration. Packages at packages/*, services at services/*, apps at apps/*
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals:true. Tests collocated as __tests__/*.test.ts or sibling *.test.ts files. Uses vi.fn() mocking.
verification_instructions: 1) Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run from repo root. 2) All new files must have corresponding .test.ts files.
setup_instructions: pnpm install from repo root. Dependencies already installed.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install packages from npm. Node >=22.0.0, pnpm@10.28.1, TypeScript ~5.5.0, Vitest ^2.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. TypeScript strict (no any). Zod for schemas. Every new file gets .test.ts.
key_patterns: Package structure: src/index.ts barrel export, package.json with workspace:* deps. Services have main.ts entry + handler pattern. Tests use describe/it/expect from vitest with vi.fn() mocks. Packages have tsconfig.json extending root, vitest.config.ts with globals:true. Existing moderation package has classes with constructor(config), Map-based storage, async methods. Security package has similar pattern. Queue uses BullMQ with Zod schemas for job definitions.
directory_structure: Root: package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts. packages/ has ~32 packages (moderation, security, queue, ai, data-plane, common, etc). services/ has ~16 microservices (search-indexer, cdc-relay, smtp-inbound, ci-runner, git-server, etc). apps/ has frontend apps.
